title: Cold Call Opener — SaaS Ops Manager
description: Earn the right to continue a cold call in under 30 seconds.
buyer_context: You're calling Sarah, Head of RevOps at a 200-person B2B SaaS company. She's already been pitched 5 times this week. She picks up on the third ring sounding slightly impatient.
user_goal: Earn 2 minutes of her time by being specific, relevant, and respectful of her time — not by pitching.
challenge_prompt: Sarah picks up: 'Hello, this is Sarah.' You have ~30 seconds. Go.

ideal_behaviors: State your name and company clearly in the first 5 seconds
Acknowledge this is a cold call honestly — builds trust
Give a specific, relevant reason for calling tied to her role or company
Ask permission to continue OR offer a crisp value hook
Keep the total opener under 30 seconds
common_mistakes: Asking 'How are you today?' (burns trust immediately)
Launching into a pitch before earning permission
Vague value prop ('we help companies grow')
Speaking too fast from nerves — hard to follow
